data.location: 2605 E. Lucas St., Beaumont, TX (zip not specified)
data.event_date: Soft launch: April 24; Grand opening: May 16
data.status: soft launch; grand opening on May 16
data.short_description: Mr. Po' Boyz Burgers and Seafood soft-launched on April 24 at a familiar north end Beaumont location with a Mardi Gras color scheme. A formal grand opening is scheduled for May 16. The restaurant serves a variety of burgers and seafood items.

Campers Inn RV is holding a company-wide grand opening event May 14–17 covering all newly rebranded Lazydays locations and current Campers Inn locations. This location is one of multiple operating under the Campers Inn brand as part of the expansion.

data.store_name: Lazydays Powered by Campers Inn RV (Tampa flagship)
data.status: grand opening; reimagined Tampa flagship debut
data.short_description: The Tampa location debuts as "Lazydays Powered by Campers Inn RV," symbolizing the blending of two industry leaders. It is the headline property of the four-day grand opening event, featuring a free RV giveaway on May 16.

data.location: 71 South Main St., Newtown, CT (zip not specified)
data.short_description: jjStacks, a bar and grill offering over 100 wing varieties, burgers, and a sports bar atmosphere, has opened at the former Eggs & Co. space in Newtown. A ribbon-cutting ceremony is scheduled for 2 p.m. on May 18. The Newtown location marks the brand's first brick-and-mortar restaurant.

data.location: 5484 Lena Road, Bradenton, FL (zip not specified)
data.status: opening soon; grand opening at 11 a.m. Monday
data.short_description: Saucy! by KFC is opening its first Manatee County location at 5484 Lena Road, off State Road 70 near Interstate 75 in Bradenton. The grand opening is scheduled for 11 a.m. Monday with giveaways and complimentary bites. The location introduces two new menu items: the Big Sammie and Saucy! x DRIPS by Pepsi drinks.

data.location: 660 Merril Road, Pittsfield, MA (zip not specified) — Stop & Shop Plaza
data.short_description: A job posting on Indeed revealed a new Jersey Mike's Subs location is planned for 660 Merril Road in Pittsfield, in the Stop & Shop Plaza next to Pizza Hut. The franchise will be operated by Liotta Brothers LLC, with limited details available so far. No confirmed opening date has been announced.

data.location: Address not specified — uptown/South End, Charlotte, NC, near Carson Station light rail
data.status: in the final stages of construction and inspections; opening in May
data.short_description: Market on Morehead is a full-service restaurant and bar opening in Charlotte in May 2026, positioned near the light rail's Carson Station with seating for 200 inside and 150 outdoors. The restaurant is a sister spot to Market on Main in Columbia, South Carolina, and features a 25-foot LED Jumbotron, a 40-seat bar, and Rail Trail patio views. Co-founder Josh Willoughby has worked for the past year to finalize the space.

data.location: Namba district, Osaka, Japan — near Nankai Shin-Imamiya and Namba Stations (full address not specified)
data.short_description: Centara Hotels & Resorts has opened Centara Life Namba Hotel Osaka, its second property in Japan, in the heart of Osaka's Namba district. The hotel features 300 non-smoking rooms, a rooftop lounge (SORA), and a breakfast dining venue (DINING). It is positioned as a lifestyle-led property offering convenience and value for a range of travellers.

data.location: Airport Road, Mohali, India (full address not specified)
data.short_description: Ramee Group of Hotels announced the opening of Ramee Collection Airport Road, Mohali, developed in partnership with Pure Hotel Pvt. Ltd. This marks the Group's first entry into the Tricity market of Mohali, Chandigarh, and Panchkula, and follows the brand's boutique presence in Amritsar. The property is positioned as a boutique hospitality destination targeting the North India luxury travel market.
